chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 974 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 13-10-2025 None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation is received. The instant Petition was filed on 05-06-2023 and after filing the matter has never come up before the Court for hearing and it is pending without any useful progress. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioners and their Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest to pursue the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
